Welcome, Artist

Artist Onboarding

Learn how to accept, manage, and complete orders at Purrfect Pal Studio.

Steps to Complete an Order

01
Jobs

Go to the Jobs page to view all assigned orders based on your art style.

● Pending
02
Ongoing Orders

Once accepted, the job moves to Ongoing Orders. Click "View Details" to begin working, message clients, and track progress.

● Active
03
Detail Page
  • Uploaded pet images
  • Client notes & background preferences
  • Live chat with client
  • Final artwork upload form
04
Submit Final Artwork
  • 300x300 branding image
  • High-resolution downloadable file
  • Pet name, breed & design detail level

Clients can request up to 4 revisions. Use chat to clarify before finalizing.

After Finishing an Order

Past Orders

Once the client marks an order as complete, it moves to your Past Orders page. You can still view submitted files and notes, but chat will be disabled.

View Past Orders
Artist Profile & Stats

Manage your personal info and track performance to build your reputation.

  • View jobs completed & total earnings
  • Upload or change profile photo
  • Update bio & skills
Edit Your Profile

Frequently Asked Questions

No problem! Simply inform us. It will be removed from your dashboard and reassigned to another artist with the same style.
Yes — only if you can complete it on time without any issues.
Use the chat box available on the Detail Page to directly communicate with the client. Ask for clarification or reference photos if needed.
You must upload:
  • A branding image (300x300px)
  • A high-resolution downloadable file
  • Pet name, breed, and design detail level

The submission form is on the Detail Page of the ongoing order.

Each client is allowed up to 4 revision requests. You'll be notified through chat when a revision is requested.
